ModMetaData.name: VOE Outpost Enhancement
ModMetaData.author: justty32
ModMetaData.description: Adds upgrade systems to all VOE outposts. - All outposts: spend silver to boost production output (up to ×2.2) - Artillery outpost: spend steel/components to increase shot count, reduce cooldown, extend range; cycle shell type (HE / Incendiary / EMP / Firefoam)
